steps.title: Keep the literary present
steps.content: The sentence describes the tortoise's role in the play using present-tense verbs: there is a tortoise, and it appears in both timelines. The blank should match that present-tense description.

steps.title: Reject unjustified tense shifts
steps.content: Choice B shifts to future perfect, Choice C shifts to simple past, and Choice D shifts to past perfect. Nothing in the sentence calls for those time shifts. The present-tense form goes by matches the surrounding verbs. The answer is A.
